RM220/#1 JUDGE:DONNA LITTLE; S.SAWYER/CSR; GVANHEST/CLERK. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. COUNSEL, CHARLES RAMSEY PRESNET ON BEHALF OF THE PLTF, DEFT VICKI SIMON PRESENT IN PRO PER. A DEFAULT HAS BEEN ENTERED AS TO DEFTS JAMILAH & LATEEFAH SIMON. A JUDGMENT PURS TO STIPULATION HAS BEEN READ INTO THE RECORD.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIMON, VICKI SIMON, JAMILAH SIMON, LATEEFAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 785 FULTON STREET #A, S.F. $5,274.00 RENT, $350.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,749.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED ID DEFT COMPLIES AS FOLLOWS: PAYS $2,259- BY 4PM 3/2/98; $753- EACH BY 3/6/98 & 3/20/98; $754- EACH BY 4/20/98, 5/20/98 & 6/20/98; $475- BY 7/20/98. IN ADDITION DEFT TO PAY MONTHLY RENT (CURRENTLY $753-) BY THE 1ST EACH MONTH. IF DEFT COMPLIES PLTF S/A JUDGMENT & FILE DISMISSAL.
